name: claude-learn-plugin
description: A Socratic tutoring plugin for Claude Code that teaches developers the fundamentals of any codebase — explaining the 'why' before the 'what'.
author: osamaatef1

commands.name: learn
commands.description: Start an interactive Socratic tutoring session for the current codebase

commands.name: learn-topic
commands.description: Deep-dive into one specific concept or area of the codebase
